package httpx

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
	v1 "github.com/paretoimproved/local-roots/backend/internal/api/v1"
	"github.com/paretoimproved/local-roots/backend/internal/config"
	"github.com/paretoimproved/local-roots/backend/internal/email"
	"github.com/paretoimproved/local-roots/backend/internal/health"
	"github.com/paretoimproved/local-roots/backend/internal/payments/stripepay"
)

type Deps struct {
	Config config.Config
	DB     *pgxpool.Pool
	Stripe *stripepay.Client
	Email  *email.Client
}

func NewHandler(deps Deps) http.Handler {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()

	mux.HandleFunc("GET /health", health.Handler(deps.DB))

	// Placeholder for versioned API.
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		_, _ = w.Write([]byte(`{"name":"local-roots","env":"` + deps.Config.Env + `"}`))
	})

	stripeClient := deps.Stripe
	emailClient := deps.Email

	public := v1.PublicAPI{DB: deps.DB, JWTSecret: deps.Config.JWTSecret}
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/stores", public.ListStores)
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/stores/{storeId}", public.GetStore)
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/stores/{storeId}/pickup-windows", public.ListStorePickupWindows)
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/pickup-windows/{pickupWindowId}", public.GetPickupWindow)
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/pickup-windows/{pickupWindowId}/offerings", public.ListPickupWindowOfferings)
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/stores/{storeId}/reviews", public.ListStoreReviews)

	sub := v1.SubscriptionAPI{
		DB:              deps.DB,
		Stripe:          stripeClient,
		BuyerFeeBps:     deps.Config.BuyerFeeBps,
		BuyerFeeFlatCts: deps.Config.BuyerFeeFlatCents,
		Email:           emailClient,
		FrontendURL:     deps.Config.FrontendURL,
	}
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/stores/{storeId}/subscription-plans", sub.ListStorePlans)
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/subscription-plans/{planId}", sub.GetPlan)
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/subscription-plans/{planId}/checkout", WithRateLimit("checkout", sub.Checkout))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/subscription-plans/{planId}/subscribe", WithRateLimit("checkout", sub.Subscribe))

	orders := v1.OrdersAPI{
		DB:              deps.DB,
		Stripe:          stripeClient,
		BuyerFeeBps:     deps.Config.BuyerFeeBps,
		BuyerFeeFlatCts: deps.Config.BuyerFeeFlatCents,
		Email:           emailClient,
		FrontendURL:     deps.Config.FrontendURL,
	}
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/pickup-windows/{pickupWindowId}/orders", WithRateLimit("checkout", orders.CreateOrder))

	orderCheckout := v1.OrderCheckoutAPI{
		DB:              deps.DB,
		Stripe:          stripeClient,
		BuyerFeeBps:     deps.Config.BuyerFeeBps,
		BuyerFeeFlatCts: deps.Config.BuyerFeeFlatCents,
	}
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/pickup-windows/{pickupWindowId}/checkout", WithRateLimit("checkout", orderCheckout.Checkout))

	buyerOrders := v1.BuyerOrdersAPI{DB: deps.DB, JWTSecret: deps.Config.JWTSecret}
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/orders/{orderId}", buyerOrders.GetOrder)
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/orders/{orderId}/review", buyerOrders.CreateReview)

	buyerSubs := v1.BuyerSubscriptionsAPI{DB: deps.DB, Stripe: stripeClient, JWTSecret: deps.Config.JWTSecret, Email: emailClient, FrontendURL: deps.Config.FrontendURL}
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}", buyerSubs.GetSubscription)
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/status", buyerSubs.UpdateStatus)
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/payment-method/setup", buyerSubs.SetupPaymentMethod)
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/payment-method/confirm", buyerSubs.ConfirmPaymentMethod)

	stripeWebhook := v1.StripeWebhookAPI{DB: deps.DB, WebhookSecret: deps.Config.StripeWebhookSecret}
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/stripe/webhook", WithRateLimit("webhook", stripeWebhook.StripeWebhook))

	authAPI := v1.AuthAPI{DB: deps.DB, JWTSecret: deps.Config.JWTSecret}
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/auth/register", WithRateLimit("auth", authAPI.Register))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/auth/login", WithRateLimit("auth", authAPI.Login))

	oauthAPI := v1.OAuthAPI{DB: deps.DB, JWTSecret: deps.Config.JWTSecret, GoogleOAuthClientID: deps.Config.GoogleOAuthClientID}
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/auth/google", WithRateLimit("auth", oauthAPI.GoogleLogin))

	buyerAuthAPI := v1.BuyerAuthAPI{DB: deps.DB, JWTSecret: deps.Config.JWTSecret, Email: emailClient, FrontendURL: deps.Config.FrontendURL}
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/buyer/auth/magic-link", WithRateLimit("auth", buyerAuthAPI.SendMagicLink))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/buyer/auth/verify", WithRateLimit("auth", buyerAuthAPI.Verify))
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/buyer/me", authAPI.RequireUser(buyerAuthAPI.GetMe))
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/buyer/orders", authAPI.RequireUser(buyerAuthAPI.ListOrders))
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/buyer/subscriptions", authAPI.RequireUser(buyerAuthAPI.ListSubscriptions))

	seller := v1.SellerAPI{DB: deps.DB}
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/seller/stores", authAPI.RequireUser(seller.ListMyStores))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/stores", authAPI.RequireUser(seller.CreateStore))
	mux.HandleFunc("PATCH /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, seller.UpdateStore)))
	mux.HandleFunc("DELETE /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, seller.DeleteStore)))

	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/pickup-locations", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, seller.ListPickupLocations)))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/pickup-locations", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, seller.CreatePickupLocation)))
	mux.HandleFunc("DELETE /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/pickup-locations/{pickupLocationId}", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, seller.DeletePickupLocation)))
	mux.HandleFunc("PATCH /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/pickup-locations/{pickupLocationId}", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, seller.UpdatePickupLocation)))

	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/pickup-windows", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, seller.ListPickupWindows)))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/pickup-windows", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, seller.CreatePickupWindow)))

	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/products", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, seller.ListProducts)))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/products", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, seller.CreateProduct)))

	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/pickup-windows/{pickupWindowId}/offerings", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, seller.ListOfferings)))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/pickup-windows/{pickupWindowId}/offerings", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, seller.CreateOffering)))

	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/subscriptions", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, seller.ListSubscriptions)))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/cancel", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, seller.CancelSubscription)))

	sellerOrders := v1.SellerOrdersAPI{DB: deps.DB, Stripe: stripeClient, NoShowFeeCents: deps.Config.NoShowFeeCents, NoShowPlatformSplitBps: deps.Config.NoShowPlatformSplitBps, Email: emailClient, FrontendURL: deps.Config.FrontendURL}
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/pickup-windows/{pickupWindowId}/orders", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, sellerOrders.ListOrdersForPickupWindow)))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/orders/{orderId}/status", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, sellerOrders.UpdateOrderStatus)))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/orders/{orderId}/confirm-pickup", WithRateLimit("pickup", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, sellerOrders.ConfirmPickup))))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/orders/lookup-by-code", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, sellerOrders.LookupByCode)))

	pickupConfirm := v1.PickupConfirmAPI{DB: deps.DB, Stripe: stripeClient, Email: emailClient, FrontendURL: deps.Config.FrontendURL}
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/seller/pickup/preview", authAPI.RequireUser(pickupConfirm.Preview))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/pickup/confirm", WithRateLimit("pickup", authAPI.RequireUser(pickupConfirm.Confirm)))

	sellerPayouts := v1.SellerPayoutsAPI{DB: deps.DB, NoShowPlatformSplitBps: deps.Config.NoShowPlatformSplitBps}
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/pickup-windows/{pickupWindowId}/payout-summary", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, sellerPayouts.GetPickupWindowPayoutSummary)))

	sellerAnalytics := v1.SellerAnalyticsAPI{DB: deps.DB}
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/analytics", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, sellerAnalytics.GetAnalytics)))
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/payouts", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, sellerAnalytics.GetPayoutHistory)))

	sellerConnect := v1.SellerConnectAPI{DB: deps.DB, Stripe: stripeClient, FrontendURL: deps.Config.FrontendURL}
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/connect/onboard", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, sellerConnect.Onboard)))
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/connect/status", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, sellerConnect.GetStatus)))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/connect/refresh-link", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, sellerConnect.RefreshLink)))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/connect/account-session", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, sellerConnect.AccountSession)))

	boxPreviews := v1.BoxPreviewAPI{DB: deps.DB}
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/plans/{planId}/previews", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, boxPreviews.Create)))
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/plans/{planId}/previews", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, boxPreviews.List)))
	mux.HandleFunc("DELETE /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/plans/{planId}/previews/{previewId}", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, boxPreviews.Delete)))
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/plans/{planId}/preview/latest", boxPreviews.Latest)

	sellerSub := v1.SellerSubscriptionAPI{
		DB:              deps.DB,
		Stripe:          stripeClient,
		BuyerFeeBps:     deps.Config.BuyerFeeBps,
		BuyerFeeFlatCts: deps.Config.BuyerFeeFlatCents,
	}
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/subscription-plans", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, sellerSub.ListPlans)))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/subscription-plans", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, sellerSub.CreatePlan)))
	mux.HandleFunc("PATCH /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/subscription-plans/{planId}", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, sellerSub.UpdatePlan)))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/stores/{storeId}/subscription-plans/{planId}/generate-cycle", authAPI.RequireUser(v1.RequireStoreOwner(deps.DB, sellerSub.GenerateNextCycle)))

	geo := v1.GeoAPI{GooglePlacesAPIKey: deps.Config.GooglePlacesAPIKey}
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/places/autocomplete", WithRateLimit("geo", geo.PublicAutocomplete))
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /v1/geocode", WithRateLimit("geo", geo.PublicGeocode))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/geo/places/autocomplete", authAPI.RequireUser(geo.PlacesAutocomplete))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/geo/places/details", authAPI.RequireUser(geo.PlacesDetails))
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/seller/geo/timezone", authAPI.RequireUser(geo.Timezone))

	internalBilling := v1.InternalBillingAPI{
		DB:     deps.DB,
		Stripe: stripeClient,
		Secret: deps.Config.InternalCronSecret,
	}
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/internal/billing/authorize-pending", internalBilling.AuthorizePending)

	internalEmail := v1.InternalEmailAPI{
		DB:          deps.DB,
		Email:       emailClient,
		Secret:      deps.Config.InternalCronSecret,
		FrontendURL: deps.Config.FrontendURL,
	}
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /v1/internal/email/pickup-reminders", internalEmail.SendPickupReminders)

	return withSecurityHeaders(withLogging(withCORS(deps.Config, mux)))
}

message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user's journey through this session:
   - Continued from a prior session where `/plan-ceo-review` (SELECTIVE EXPANSION mode, clean), `/plan-eng-review` (clean), and `/plan-design-review` (just started) were run against the Phase 8: Growth & Retention implementation plan for Local Roots.
   - The design review was completed in this session, going through all 7 passes (Info Architecture, Interaction States, User Journey, AI Slop Risk, Design System, Responsive/A11y, Unresolved Decisions). Overall design score went from 4/10 ‚Üí 8/10. All 3 reviews now show CLEARED.
   - The user then said **"build"** ‚Äî requesting full implementation of Phase 8.
   - Phase 8 scope: Buyer re-engagement cron system, enhanced seller analytics, public store profiles/SEO (city pages, sitemap, robots, OG images, JSON-LD), payout hardening (transfer retry), multi-location UX, plus 6 CEO-accepted expansions: "What's in the box" display, waitlist email capture, seller weekly digest, subscriber milestones, dynamic OG images, post-pickup review prompts.

2. Key Technical Concepts:

   - **Cron pattern**: `time.NewTicker` with goroutines, panic recovery, scheduler.Start blocks until ctx cancelled
   - **Email template pattern**: Functions returning `(subject, body string)` using `fmt.Sprintf`
   - **Endpoint registration**: `http.NewServeMux()` with `METHOD /path` syntax, middleware wrapping (RequireUser ‚Üí RequireStoreOwner ‚Üí WithRateLimit)
   - **Transfer failure recording**: `transferToSeller` now records errors to `transfer_error`, `transfer_attempted_at`, `transfer_retry_count` columns for retry cron pickup

1‚Üípackage v1
     2‚Üí
     3‚Üíimport (

     5‚Üí	"fmt"

     8‚Üí

    11‚Üí	"github.com/paretoimproved/local-roots/backend/internal/email"

    13‚Üí
    14‚Üí// ReengagementResult holds the outcome of a lapsed-subscriber reengagement run.
    15‚Üítype ReengagementResult struct {
    16‚Üí	Candidates int
    17‚Üí	Sent       int
    18‚Üí}
    19‚Üí
    20‚Üí// RunReengagement finds active subscribers who haven't picked up in 2+ cycles
    21‚Üí// (based on plan cadence) and sends them a nudge email. Idempotent: only sends
    22‚Üí// once per 14 days per subscription (last_reengagement_email_at).
    23‚Üífunc RunReengagement(ctx context.Context, db *pgxpool.Pool, emailClient *email.Client, frontendURL string) (ReengagementResult, error) {
    24‚Üí	if db == nil {
    25‚Üí		return ReengagementResult{}, fmt.Errorf("database not configured")
    26‚Üí	}
    27‚Üí	if emailClient == nil || !emailClient.Enabled() {
    28‚Üí		return ReengagementResult{}, fmt.Errorf("email not configured")
    29‚Üí	}
    30‚Üí
    31‚Üí	rows, err := db.Query(ctx, `
    32‚Üí		SELECT s.id::text, s.buyer_email, s.buyer_name, sp.title as plan_title,
    33‚Üí		       sp.cadence, st.name as store_name, st.id::text as store_id
    34‚Üí		FROM subscriptions s
    35‚Üí		JOIN subscription_plans sp ON sp.id = s.plan_id
    36‚Üí		JOIN stores st ON st.id = s.store_id
    37‚Üí		WHERE s.status = 'active'
    38‚Üí		  AND (s.last_reengagement_email_at IS NULL
    39‚Üí		       OR s.last_reengagement_email_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days')
    40‚Üí		  AND NOT EXISTS (
    41‚Üí		    SELECT 1 FROM orders o
    42‚Üí		    WHERE o.subscription_id = s.id
    43‚Üí		      AND o.status = 'picked_up'
    44‚Üí		      AND o.picked_up_at > NOW() - (
    45‚Üí		        CASE sp.cadence
    46‚Üí		          WHEN 'weekly' THEN INTERVAL '14 days'
    47‚Üí		          WHEN 'biweekly' THEN INTERVAL '28 days'
    48‚Üí		          WHEN 'monthly' THEN INTERVAL '60 days'
    49‚Üí		        END
    50‚Üí		      )
    51‚Üí		  )
    52‚Üí		LIMIT 50
    53‚Üí	`)
    54‚Üí	if err != nil {
    55‚Üí		return ReengagementResult{}, err
    56‚Üí	}
    57‚Üí	defer rows.Close()
    58‚Üí
    59‚Üí	type candidate struct {
    60‚Üí		subID      string
    61‚Üí		buyerEmail string
    62‚Üí		buyerName  string
    63‚Üí		planTitle  string
    64‚Üí		cadence    string
    65‚Üí		storeName  string
    66‚Üí		storeID    string
    67‚Üí	}
    68‚Üí
    69‚Üí	var candidates []candidate
    70‚Üí	for rows.Next() {
    71‚Üí		var c candidate
    72‚Üí		if err := rows.Scan(&c.subID, &c.buyerEmail, &c.buyerName, &c.planTitle, &c.cadence, &c.storeName, &c.storeID); err != nil {
    73‚Üí			return ReengagementResult{}, err
    74‚Üí		}
    75‚Üí		candidates = append(candidates, c)
    76‚Üí	}
    77‚Üí	if rows.Err() != nil {
    78‚Üí		return ReengagementResult{}, rows.Err()
    79‚Üí	}
    80‚Üí
    81‚Üí	sent := 0
    82‚Üí	baseURL := strings.TrimRight(frontendURL, "/")
    83‚Üí
    84‚Üí	for _, c := range candidates {
    85‚Üí		storeURL := baseURL + "/stores/" + c.storeID
    86‚Üí
    87‚Üí		subj, body := email.LapsedSubscriberNudge(c.storeName, c.planTitle, storeURL)
    88‚Üí		if err := emailClient.Send(c.buyerEmail, subj, body); err != nil {
    89‚Üí			log.Printf("reengagement: failed to send to %s (sub=%s): %v", c.buyerEmail, c.subID, err)
    90‚Üí			continue
    91‚Üí		}
    92‚Üí
    93‚Üí		if _, err := db.Exec(ctx, `
    94‚Üí			UPDATE subscriptions SET last_reengagement_email_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1::uuid
    95‚Üí		`, c.subID); err != nil {
    96‚Üí			log.Printf("reengagement: failed to update last_reengagement_email_at for sub=%s: %v", c.subID, err)
    97‚Üí		}
    98‚Üí
    99‚Üí		sent++
   100‚Üí	}
   101‚Üí
   102‚Üí	return ReengagementResult{
   103‚Üí		Candidates: len(candidates),
   104‚Üí		Sent:       sent,
   105‚Üí	}, nil
   106‚Üí}
   107‚Üí
   108‚Üí// ReviewPromptResult holds the outcome of a post-pickup review prompt run.
   109‚Üítype ReviewPromptResult struct {
   110‚Üí	Candidates int
   111‚Üí	Sent       int
   112‚Üí}
   113‚Üí
   114‚Üí// RunReviewPrompts finds orders picked up 2+ hours ago that have no review and
   115‚Üí// no prior prompt, then sends the buyer a review request email.
   116‚Üífunc RunReviewPrompts(ctx context.Context, db *pgxpool.Pool, emailClient *email.Client, frontendURL string) (ReviewPromptResult, error) {
   117‚Üí	if db == nil {
   118‚Üí		return ReviewPromptResult{}, fmt.Errorf("database not configured")
   119‚Üí	}
   120‚Üí	if emailClient == nil || !emailClient.Enabled() {
   121‚Üí		return ReviewPromptResult{}, fmt.Errorf("email not configured")
   122‚Üí	}
   123‚Üí
   124‚Üí	rows, err := db.Query(ctx, `
   125‚Üí		SELECT o.id::text, o.buyer_email, o.store_id::text, o.buyer_token,
   126‚Üí		       COALESCE(sp.title, o.product_title, 'Order') as box_title,
   127‚Üí		       st.name as store_name
   128‚Üí		FROM orders o
   129‚Üí		LEFT JOIN subscription_plans sp ON sp.id = o.plan_id
   130‚Üí		JOIN stores st ON st.id = o.store_id
   131‚Üí		WHERE o.status = 'picked_up'
   132‚Üí		  AND o.picked_up_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'
   133‚Üí		  AND o.review_prompt_sent_at IS NULL
   134‚Üí		  AND NOT EXISTS (
   135‚Üí		    SELECT 1 FROM reviews r WHERE r.order_id = o.id
   136‚Üí		  )
   137‚Üí		LIMIT 50
   138‚Üí	`)
   139‚Üí	if err != nil {
   140‚Üí		return ReviewPromptResult{}, err
   141‚Üí	}
   142‚Üí	defer rows.Close()
   143‚Üí
   144‚Üí	type candidate struct {
   145‚Üí		orderID    string
   146‚Üí		buyerEmail string
   147‚Üí		storeID    string
   148‚Üí		buyerToken string
   149‚Üí		boxTitle   string
   150‚Üí		storeName  string
   151‚Üí	}
   152‚Üí
   153‚Üí	var candidates []candidate
   154‚Üí	for rows.Next() {
   155‚Üí		var c candidate
   156‚Üí		if err := rows.Scan(&c.orderID, &c.buyerEmail, &c.storeID, &c.buyerToken, &c.boxTitle, &c.storeName); err != nil {
   157‚Üí			return ReviewPromptResult{}, err
   158‚Üí		}
   159‚Üí		candidates = append(candidates, c)
   160‚Üí	}
   161‚Üí	if rows.Err() != nil {
   162‚Üí		return ReviewPromptResult{}, rows.Err()
   163‚Üí	}
   164‚Üí
   165‚Üí	sent := 0
   166‚Üí	baseURL := strings.TrimRight(frontendURL, "/")
   167‚Üí
   168‚Üí	for _, c := range candidates {
   169‚Üí		reviewURL := baseURL + "/orders/" + c.orderID + "?t=" + c.buyerToken
   170‚Üí
   171‚Üí		subj, body := email.PostPickupReviewPrompt(c.storeName, c.boxTitle, reviewURL)
   172‚Üí		if err := emailClient.Send(c.buyerEmail, subj, body); err != nil {
   173‚Üí			log.Printf("review-prompt: failed to send to %s (order=%s): %v", c.buyerEmail, c.orderID, err)
   174‚Üí			continue
   175‚Üí		}
   176‚Üí
   177‚Üí		if _, err := db.Exec(ctx, `
   178‚Üí			UPDATE orders SET review_prompt_sent_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1::uuid
   179‚Üí		`, c.orderID); err != nil {
   180‚Üí			log.Printf("review-prompt: failed to update review_prompt_sent_at for order=%s: %v", c.orderID, err)
   181‚Üí		}
   182‚Üí
   183‚Üí		sent++
   184‚Üí	}
   185‚Üí
   186‚Üí	return ReviewPromptResult{
   187‚Üí		Candidates: len(candidates),
   188‚Üí		Sent:       sent,
   189‚Üí	}, nil
   190‚Üí}
   191‚Üí

1‚Üípackage v1
     2‚Üí
     3‚Üíimport (
     4‚Üí	"context"
     5‚Üí	"fmt"
     6‚Üí	"log"
     7‚Üí	"strings"
     8‚Üí
     9‚Üí	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
    10‚Üí
    11‚Üí	"github.com/paretoimproved/local-roots/backend/internal/payments/stripepay"
    12‚Üí)
    13‚Üí
    14‚Üí// TransferRetryResult holds the outcome of a transfer retry run.
    15‚Üítype TransferRetryResult struct {
    16‚Üí	Candidates int
    17‚Üí	Retried    int
    18‚Üí	Failed     int
    19‚Üí}
    20‚Üí
    21‚Üí// RunTransferRetry finds orders whose seller transfer failed and retries them
    22‚Üí// (up to 3 attempts). Safe to call from both the HTTP handler and the
    23‚Üí// in-process scheduler.
    24‚Üífunc RunTransferRetry(ctx context.Context, db *pgxpool.Pool, sc *stripepay.Client) (TransferRetryResult, error) {
    25‚Üí	if db == nil {
    26‚Üí		return TransferRetryResult{}, fmt.Errorf("database not configured")
    27‚Üí	}
    28‚Üí	if sc == nil || !sc.Enabled() {
    29‚Üí		return TransferRetryResult{}, fmt.Errorf("payments not configured")
    30‚Üí	}
    31‚Üí
    32‚Üí	rows, err := db.Query(ctx, `
    33‚Üí		SELECT o.id::text, o.store_id::text, o.stripe_payment_intent_id,
    34‚Üí		       o.total_cents, o.transfer_retry_count
    35‚Üí		FROM orders o
    36‚Üí		WHERE o.transfer_attempted_at IS NOT NULL
    37‚Üí		  AND o.stripe_transfer_id IS NULL
    38‚Üí		  AND o.transfer_error IS NOT NULL
    39‚Üí		  AND o.transfer_retry_count < 3
    40‚Üí		  AND o.status IN ('picked_up', 'no_show')
    41‚Üí		  AND o.refunded_at IS NULL
    42‚Üí		LIMIT 20
    43‚Üí	`)
    44‚Üí	if err != nil {
    45‚Üí		return TransferRetryResult{}, err
    46‚Üí	}
    47‚Üí	defer rows.Close()
    48‚Üí
    49‚Üí	type candidate struct {
    50‚Üí		orderID    string
    51‚Üí		storeID    string
    52‚Üí		piID       string
    53‚Üí		totalCents int
    54‚Üí		retryCount int
    55‚Üí	}
    56‚Üí
    57‚Üí	var cands []candidate
    58‚Üí	for rows.Next() {
    59‚Üí		var c candidate
    60‚Üí		if err := rows.Scan(&c.orderID, &c.storeID, &c.piID, &c.totalCents, &c.retryCount); err != nil {
    61‚Üí			return TransferRetryResult{}, err
    62‚Üí		}
    63‚Üí		cands = append(cands, c)
    64‚Üí	}
    65‚Üí	if rows.Err() != nil {
    66‚Üí		return TransferRetryResult{}, rows.Err()
    67‚Üí	}
    68‚Üí
    69‚Üí	retried := 0
    70‚Üí	failed := 0
    71‚Üí
    72‚Üí	for _, c := range cands {
    73‚Üí		// Look up store's Stripe Connect account.
    74‚Üí		var connectAccountID *string
    75‚Üí		var connectStatus string
    76‚Üí		if err := db.QueryRow(ctx, `
    77‚Üí			SELECT stripe_account_id, stripe_account_status
    78‚Üí			FROM stores
    79‚Üí			WHERE id = $1::uuid
    80‚Üí		`, c.storeID).Scan(&connectAccountID, &connectStatus); err != nil {
    81‚Üí			log.Printf("transfer-retry: store lookup failed for order %s: %v", c.orderID, err)
    82‚Üí			failed++
    83‚Üí			updateTransferError(ctx, db, c.orderID, fmt.Sprintf("store lookup: %v", err))
    84‚Üí			continue
    85‚Üí		}
    86‚Üí
    87‚Üí		if connectAccountID == nil || strings.TrimSpace(*connectAccountID) == "" || connectStatus != "active" {
    88‚Üí			log.Printf("transfer-retry: skipping order %s ‚Äî store %s account not active", c.orderID, c.storeID)
    89‚Üí			failed++
    90‚Üí			updateTransferError(ctx, db, c.orderID, "store connect account not active")
    91‚Üí			continue
    92‚Üí		}
    93‚Üí
    94‚Üí		chargeID, err := sc.GetChargeIDFromPaymentIntent(ctx, c.piID)
    95‚Üí		if err != nil {
    96‚Üí			log.Printf("transfer-retry: get charge failed for order %s: %v", c.orderID, err)
    97‚Üí			failed++
    98‚Üí			updateTransferError(ctx, db, c.orderID, fmt.Sprintf("get charge: %v", err))
    99‚Üí			continue
   100‚Üí		}
   101‚Üí
   102‚Üí		transferID, err := sc.CreateTransfer(ctx, c.totalCents, *connectAccountID, chargeID, "retry-"+c.orderID)
   103‚Üí		if err != nil {
   104‚Üí			log.Printf("transfer-retry: transfer failed for order %s: %v", c.orderID, err)
   105‚Üí			failed++
   106‚Üí			updateTransferError(ctx, db, c.orderID, fmt.Sprintf("transfer: %v", err))
   107‚Üí			continue
   108‚Üí		}
   109‚Üí
   110‚Üí		_, _ = db.Exec(ctx, `
   111‚Üí			UPDATE orders
   112‚Üí			SET stripe_transfer_id = $1,
   113‚Üí			    transfer_error = NULL,
   114‚Üí			    transfer_attempted_at = NOW()
   115‚Üí			WHERE id = $2::uuid
   116‚Üí		`, transferID, c.orderID)
   117‚Üí
   118‚Üí		log.Printf("transfer-retry: success for order %s (transfer %s)", c.orderID, transferID)
   119‚Üí		retried++
   120‚Üí	}
   121‚Üí
   122‚Üí	return TransferRetryResult{
   123‚Üí		Candidates: len(cands),
   124‚Üí		Retried:    retried,
   125‚Üí		Failed:     failed,
   126‚Üí	}, nil
   127‚Üí}
   128‚Üí
   129‚Üífunc updateTransferError(ctx context.Context, db *pgxpool.Pool, orderID string, errMsg string) {
   130‚Üí	_, _ = db.Exec(ctx, `
   131‚Üí		UPDATE orders
   132‚Üí		SET transfer_retry_count = transfer_retry_count + 1,
   133‚Üí		    transfer_error = $1,
   134‚Üí		    transfer_attempted_at = NOW()
   135‚Üí		WHERE id = $2::uuid
   136‚Üí	`, errMsg, orderID)
   137‚Üí}
   138‚Üí

1‚Üípackage v1
     2‚Üí
     3‚Üíimport (
     4‚Üí	"context"
     5‚Üí	"fmt"
     6‚Üí	"log"
     7‚Üí
     8‚Üí	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
     9‚Üí
    10‚Üí	"github.com/paretoimproved/local-roots/backend/internal/email"
    11‚Üí)
    12‚Üí
    13‚Üí// MilestoneResult holds the outcome of a milestone email run.
    14‚Üítype MilestoneResult struct {
    15‚Üí	Candidates int
    16‚Üí	Sent       int
    17‚Üí}
    18‚Üí
    19‚Üí// RunMilestoneEmails finds subscribers who have hit cumulative pickup milestones
    20‚Üí// (5, 10, 25, 50) and sends a celebration email. Idempotent: only sends once
    21‚Üí// per subscription + milestone pair via the milestone_emails table.
    22‚Üífunc RunMilestoneEmails(ctx context.Context, db *pgxpool.Pool, emailClient *email.Client) (MilestoneResult, error) {
    23‚Üí	if db == nil {
    24‚Üí		return MilestoneResult{}, fmt.Errorf("database not configured")
    25‚Üí	}
    26‚Üí	if emailClient == nil || !emailClient.Enabled() {
    27‚Üí		return MilestoneResult{}, fmt.Errorf("email not configured")
    28‚Üí	}
    29‚Üí
    30‚Üí	rows, err := db.Query(ctx, `
    31‚Üí		SELECT s.id as subscription_id, s.buyer_email, s.buyer_name,
    32‚Üí		       st.name as store_name, st.id as store_id,
    33‚Üí		       COUNT(o.id) as pickup_count
    34‚Üí		FROM subscriptions s
    35‚Üí		JOIN stores st ON st.id = s.store_id
    36‚Üí		JOIN orders o ON o.subscription_id IN (
    37‚Üí		    SELECT s2.id FROM subscriptions s2
    38‚Üí		    WHERE s2.buyer_email = s.buyer_email AND s2.store_id = s.store_id
    39‚Üí		)
    40‚Üí		WHERE s.status = 'active'
    41‚Üí		  AND o.status = 'picked_up'
    42‚Üí		GROUP BY s.id, s.buyer_email, s.buyer_name, st.name, st.id
    43‚Üí		HAVING COUNT(o.id) IN (5, 10, 25, 50)
    44‚Üí		LIMIT 100
    45‚Üí	`)
    46‚Üí	if err != nil {
    47‚Üí		return MilestoneResult{}, err
    48‚Üí	}
    49‚Üí	defer rows.Close()
    50‚Üí
    51‚Üí	type candidate struct {
    52‚Üí		subscriptionID string
    53‚Üí		buyerEmail     string
    54‚Üí		buyerName      string
    55‚Üí		storeName      string
    56‚Üí		storeID        string
    57‚Üí		pickupCount    int
    58‚Üí	}
    59‚Üí
    60‚Üí	var candidates []candidate
    61‚Üí	for rows.Next() {
    62‚Üí		var c candidate
    63‚Üí		var namePtr *string
    64‚Üí		if err := rows.Scan(&c.subscriptionID, &c.buyerEmail, &namePtr, &c.storeName, &c.storeID, &c.pickupCount); err != nil {
    65‚Üí			return MilestoneResult{}, err
    66‚Üí		}
    67‚Üí		if namePtr != nil {
    68‚Üí			c.buyerName = *namePtr
    69‚Üí		}
    70‚Üí		candidates = append(candidates, c)
    71‚Üí	}
    72‚Üí	if rows.Err() != nil {
    73‚Üí		return MilestoneResult{}, rows.Err()
    74‚Üí	}
    75‚Üí
    76‚Üí	sent := 0
    77‚Üí	for _, c := range candidates {
    78‚Üí		milestone := fmt.Sprintf("%d", c.pickupCount)
    79‚Üí
    80‚Üí		// Check if we already sent this milestone for this subscription.
    81‚Üí		var exists bool
    82‚Üí		err := db.QueryRow(ctx, `
    83‚Üí			SELECT EXISTS(
    84‚Üí				SELECT 1 FROM milestone_emails
    85‚Üí				WHERE subscription_id = $1::uuid AND milestone = $2
    86‚Üí			)
    87‚Üí		`, c.subscriptionID, milestone).Scan(&exists)
    88‚Üí		if err != nil {
    89‚Üí			log.Printf("milestone: error checking existing record sub=%s milestone=%s: %v", c.subscriptionID, milestone, err)
    90‚Üí			continue
    91‚Üí		}
    92‚Üí		if exists {
    93‚Üí			continue
    94‚Üí		}
    95‚Üí
    96‚Üí		subj, body := email.MilestoneCelebration(c.buyerName, c.storeName, milestone)
    97‚Üí		if err := emailClient.Send(c.buyerEmail, subj, body); err != nil {
    98‚Üí			log.Printf("milestone: error sending email to=%s sub=%s milestone=%s: %v", c.buyerEmail, c.subscriptionID, milestone, err)
    99‚Üí			continue
   100‚Üí		}
   101‚Üí
   102‚Üí		_, err = db.Exec(ctx, `
   103‚Üí			INSERT INTO milestone_emails (subscription_id, milestone) VALUES ($1::uuid, $2)
   104‚Üí		`, c.subscriptionID, milestone)
   105‚Üí		if err != nil {
   106‚Üí			log.Printf("milestone: error recording sent email sub=%s milestone=%s: %v", c.subscriptionID, milestone, err)
   107‚Üí			continue
   108‚Üí		}
   109‚Üí
   110‚Üí		sent++
   111‚Üí	}
   112‚Üí
   113‚Üí	return MilestoneResult{
   114‚Üí		Candidates: len(candidates),
   115‚Üí		Sent:       sent,
   116‚Üí	}, nil
   117‚Üí}
   118‚Üí

1‚Üípackage v1
     2‚Üí
     3‚Üíimport (
     4‚Üí	"context"
     5‚Üí	"fmt"
     6‚Üí	"log"
     7‚Üí
     8‚Üí	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
     9‚Üí
    10‚Üí	"github.com/paretoimproved/local-roots/backend/internal/email"
    11‚Üí)
    12‚Üí
    13‚Üí// DigestResult holds the outcome of a seller weekly digest run.
    14‚Üítype DigestResult struct {
    15‚Üí	Candidates int
    16‚Üí	Sent       int
    17‚Üí}
    18‚Üí
    19‚Üí// RunSellerDigest sends a weekly digest email to each seller with an active store
    20‚Üí// that has at least one active subscription. Includes active subscriber count,
    21‚Üí// pickups this week, and revenue this week.
    22‚Üífunc RunSellerDigest(ctx context.Context, db *pgxpool.Pool, emailClient *email.Client) (DigestResult, error) {
    23‚Üí	if db == nil {
    24‚Üí		return DigestResult{}, fmt.Errorf("database not configured")
    25‚Üí	}
    26‚Üí	if emailClient == nil || !emailClient.Enabled() {
    27‚Üí		return DigestResult{}, fmt.Errorf("email not configured")
    28‚Üí	}
    29‚Üí
    30‚Üí	rows, err := db.Query(ctx, `
    31‚Üí		SELECT DISTINCT st.id::text, st.name, u.email as seller_email
    32‚Üí		FROM stores st
    33‚Üí		JOIN users u ON u.id = st.user_id
    34‚Üí		WHERE st.is_active = true
    35‚Üí		  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subscriptions sub WHERE sub.store_id = st.id AND sub.status = 'active')
    36‚Üí	`)
    37‚Üí	if err != nil {
    38‚Üí		return DigestResult{}, err
    39‚Üí	}
    40‚Üí	defer rows.Close()
    41‚Üí
    42‚Üí	type store struct {
    43‚Üí		storeID     string
    44‚Üí		storeName   string
    45‚Üí		sellerEmail string
    46‚Üí	}
    47‚Üí
    48‚Üí	var stores []store
    49‚Üí	for rows.Next() {
    50‚Üí		var s store
    51‚Üí		if err := rows.Scan(&s.storeID, &s.storeName, &s.sellerEmail); err != nil {
    52‚Üí			return DigestResult{}, err
    53‚Üí		}
    54‚Üí		stores = append(stores, s)
    55‚Üí	}
    56‚Üí	if rows.Err() != nil {
    57‚Üí		return DigestResult{}, rows.Err()
    58‚Üí	}
    59‚Üí
    60‚Üí	sent := 0
    61‚Üí	for _, s := range stores {
    62‚Üí		var activeSubs int
    63‚Üí		var pickupsWeek int
    64‚Üí		var revenueWeek int
    65‚Üí
    66‚Üí		err := db.QueryRow(ctx, `
    67‚Üí			SELECT
    68‚Üí			  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscriptions WHERE store_id = $1::uuid AND status = 'active') as active_subs,
    69‚Üí			  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE store_id = $1::uuid AND status = 'picked_up' AND picked_up_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') as pickups_week,
    70‚Üí			  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_cents), 0) FROM orders WHERE store_id = $1::uuid AND status = 'picked_up' AND picked_up_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') as revenue_week
    71‚Üí		`, s.storeID).Scan(&activeSubs, &pickupsWeek, &revenueWeek)
    72‚Üí		if err != nil {
    73‚Üí			log.Printf("digest: error querying metrics for store=%s: %v", s.storeID, err)
    74‚Üí			continue
    75‚Üí		}
    76‚Üí
    77‚Üí		activeSubsStr := fmt.Sprintf("%d", activeSubs)
    78‚Üí		pickupsStr := fmt.Sprintf("%d", pickupsWeek)
    79‚Üí		revenueFormatted := fmt.Sprintf("$%.2f", float64(revenueWeek)/100)
    80‚Üí
    81‚Üí		subj, body := email.SellerWeeklyDigest(s.storeName, activeSubsStr, pickupsStr, revenueFormatted)
    82‚Üí		if err := emailClient.Send(s.sellerEmail, subj, body); err != nil {
    83‚Üí			log.Printf("digest: error sending email to=%s store=%s: %v", s.sellerEmail, s.storeID, err)
    84‚Üí			continue
    85‚Üí		}
    86‚Üí
    87‚Üí		sent++
    88‚Üí	}
    89‚Üí
    90‚Üí	return DigestResult{
    91‚Üí		Candidates: len(stores),
    92‚Üí		Sent:       sent,
    93‚Üí	}, nil
    94‚Üí}
    95‚Üí

1‚Üípackage email
     2‚Üí

     4‚Üí
     5‚Üífunc SubscriptionConfirmed(boxTitle string, nextPickupDate string, location string, manageURL string) (subject string, body string) {
     6‚Üí	subject = fmt.Sprintf("You're subscribed to %s", boxTitle)
     7‚Üí	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!
     8‚Üí
     9‚ÜíYou're now subscribed to %s.
    10‚Üí
    11‚ÜíYour next pickup:
    12‚Üí  %s
    13‚Üí  %s

    92‚Üífunc OneTimeOrderConfirmed(boxTitle, pickupCode, orderURL string) (subject string, body string) {
    93‚Üí	subject = fmt.Sprintf("Order confirmed: %s", boxTitle)
    94‚Üí	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!

    96‚ÜíYour order for %s has been placed.
    97‚Üí
    98‚Üí  Pickup code: %s
    99‚Üí
   100‚ÜíView your order:
   101‚Üí  %s
   102‚Üí
   103‚ÜíThanks for supporting local food!
   104‚Üí
   105‚Üí‚Äî Local Roots
   106‚Üí`, boxTitle, pickupCode, orderURL)
   107‚Üí	return
   108‚Üí}
   109‚Üí

package email

import "fmt"

func SubscriptionConfirmed(boxTitle string, nextPickupDate string, location string, manageURL string) (subject string, body string) {
	subject = fmt.Sprintf("You're subscribed to %s", boxTitle)
	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!

You're now subscribed to %s.

Your next pickup:
  %s
  %s

Manage your subscription:
  %s

Thanks for supporting local food!

‚Äî Local Roots
`, boxTitle, nextPickupDate, location, manageURL)
	return
}

func PickupReminder(boxTitle string, pickupTime string, location string, pickupCode string, orderURL string) (subject string, body string) {
	subject = fmt.Sprintf("Pickup reminder: %s tomorrow", boxTitle)
	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!

Your %s pickup is coming up:

  When: %s
  Where: %s
  Pickup code: %s

View your order:
  %s

See you there!

‚Äî Local Roots
`, boxTitle, pickupTime, location, pickupCode, orderURL)
	return
}

func OrderReady(boxTitle string, pickupCode string, orderURL string) (subject string, body string) {
	subject = fmt.Sprintf("Your %s order is ready!", boxTitle)
	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!

Your %s order is ready for pickup!

  Pickup code: %s

View your order:
  %s

‚Äî Local Roots
`, boxTitle, pickupCode, orderURL)
	return
}

func MagicLink(verifyURL string) (subject string, body string) {
	subject = "Your Local Roots sign-in link"
	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!

Click the link below to sign in to Local Roots:

  %s

This link expires in 15 minutes. If you didn't request this, you can ignore this email.

‚Äî Local Roots
`, verifyURL)
	return
}

func PaymentReceipt(amountFormatted string, boxTitle string, orderURL string) (subject string, body string) {
	subject = fmt.Sprintf("Receipt: %s for %s", amountFormatted, boxTitle)
	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!

Your payment of %s for %s has been processed.

View your order:
  %s

Thank you for supporting local food!

‚Äî Local Roots
`, amountFormatted, boxTitle, orderURL)
	return
}

func OneTimeOrderConfirmed(boxTitle, pickupCode, orderURL string) (subject string, body string) {
	subject = fmt.Sprintf("Order confirmed: %s", boxTitle)
	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!

Your order for %s has been placed.

  Pickup code: %s

View your order:
  %s

Thanks for supporting local food!

‚Äî Local Roots
`, boxTitle, pickupCode, orderURL)
	return
}

func NewSubscriberNotification(buyerEmail, planTitle, storeName string) (subject string, body string) {
	subject = fmt.Sprintf("New subscriber to %s", planTitle)
	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!

You have a new subscriber to %s at %s.

  Buyer: %s

Log in to your dashboard to view details.

‚Äî Local Roots
`, planTitle, storeName, buyerEmail)
	return
}

func NewOrderNotification(buyerEmail, boxTitle, storeName string) (subject string, body string) {
	subject = fmt.Sprintf("New order: %s", boxTitle)
	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!

A new order has been placed for %s at %s.

  Buyer: %s

Log in to your dashboard to view and manage this order.

‚Äî Local Roots
`, boxTitle, storeName, buyerEmail)
	return
}

func NoShowNotification(boxTitle, feeFormatted, orderURL string) (subject string, body string) {
	subject = fmt.Sprintf("Missed pickup: %s", boxTitle)
	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!

It looks like you missed your pickup for %s.

A no-show fee of %s has been charged.

View your order:
  %s

If you believe this is an error, please contact the seller.

‚Äî Local Roots
`, boxTitle, feeFormatted, orderURL)
	return
}

func NoShowWaived(boxTitle, orderURL string) (subject string, body string) {
	subject = fmt.Sprintf("Missed pickup: %s", boxTitle)
	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!

It looks like you missed your pickup for %s.

The no-show fee has been waived this time.

View your order:
  %s

‚Äî Local Roots
`, boxTitle, orderURL)
	return
}

func OrderCanceled(boxTitle, orderURL string) (subject string, body string) {
	subject = fmt.Sprintf("Order canceled: %s", boxTitle)
	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!

Your order for %s has been canceled.

View your order:
  %s

If you have any questions, please contact the seller.

‚Äî Local Roots
`, boxTitle, orderURL)
	return
}

func SubscriptionCanceled(planTitle, storeName string) (subject string, body string) {
	subject = fmt.Sprintf("Subscription canceled: %s", planTitle)
	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!

Your subscription to %s at %s has been canceled.

You will not be charged for future pickups.

If you'd like to resubscribe, visit the store page.

‚Äî Local Roots
`, planTitle, storeName)
	return
}

func LapsedSubscriberNudge(storeName, planTitle, storeURL string) (subject string, body string) {
	subject = fmt.Sprintf("We miss you at %s!", storeName)
	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!

It's been a while since your last pickup from %s. Your %s box is waiting for you!

Don't miss out on fresh, local food. Your next box is just around the corner.

Visit the store:
  %s

‚Äî Local Roots
`, storeName, planTitle, storeURL)
	return
}

func PostPickupReviewPrompt(storeName, boxTitle, reviewURL string) (subject string, body string) {
	subject = fmt.Sprintf("How was your box from %s?", storeName)
	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!

Thanks for picking up your %s box from %s!

We'd love to hear how it was. Your feedback helps the farmer and other buyers.

Leave a review:
  %s

‚Äî Local Roots
`, boxTitle, storeName, reviewURL)
	return
}

func MilestoneCelebration(buyerName, storeName, milestone string) (subject string, body string) {
	subject = fmt.Sprintf("Milestone: %s pickups from %s!", milestone, storeName)
	greeting := "Hi there!"
	if buyerName != "" {
		greeting = fmt.Sprintf("Hi %s!", buyerName)
	}
	body = fmt.Sprintf(`%s

You've completed %s pickups from %s. That's amazing!

Thank you for supporting local food and your community farmer. Here's to many more!

‚Äî Local Roots
`, greeting, milestone, storeName)
	return
}

func SellerWeeklyDigest(storeName string, activeSubs, pickupsThisWeek, revenueFormatted string) (subject string, body string) {
	subject = fmt.Sprintf("Weekly digest: %s", storeName)
	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!

Here's your weekly summary for %s:

  Active subscribers: %s
  Pickups this week:  %s
  Revenue this week:  %s

Log in to your dashboard for full analytics.

‚Äî Local Roots
`, storeName, activeSubs, pickupsThisWeek, revenueFormatted)
	return
}

func WaitlistNotification(city, storeURL string) (subject string, body string) {
	subject = fmt.Sprintf("A farm just joined near %s!", city)
	body = fmt.Sprintf(`Hi there!

Great news ‚Äî a new farm just joined Local Roots near %s!

Check it out and subscribe to start getting fresh, local food:
  %s

‚Äî Local Roots
`, city, storeURL)
	return
}

input.prompt:
Create a city landing page at `/Users/brandonqueener/Cursor Projects/Local-Roots/frontend/src/app/farms/[city]/page.tsx`.

This is a Next.js App Router server component page for SEO-friendly city landing pages. The `city` param is a slug like `portland-or` or `austin-tx`.

Requirements:
1. Server component (use `await params`)
2. Fetch stores from the backend API using the `api` from `@/lib/api`
3. Also fetch city list from `GET /v1/cities` ‚Äî you'll need to add a `listCities` function to `@/lib/api` first (READ api.ts first to understand the pattern)
4. The cities endpoint returns `{ city, region, slug, store_count }[]`
5. Match the slug from params against the city list to get the proper city name
6. Generate metadata (title, description, og) using `generateMetadata`
7. Display stores using the existing `StoreCard` component from `@/components/store-card`
8. Add JSON-LD structured data for the city (LocalBusiness collection)
9. Use the project's design system: `lr-card`, `lr-card-strong`, `lr-animate`, `var(--lr-ink)`, `var(--lr-muted)`, `var(--lr-leaf)`, `var(--lr-bg)`
10. Include a link back to `/stores` (all farms)
11. Show empty state if no stores found: "No farms in {City} yet" with a friendly message
12. Heading pattern: "Local Farms in {City}, {Region}"

First READ these files to understand patterns:
- `/Users/brandonqueener/Cursor Projects/Local-Roots/frontend/src/lib/api.ts`
- `/Users/brandonqueener/Cursor Projects/Local-Roots/frontend/src/components/store-card.tsx`
- `/Users/brandonqueener/Cursor Projects/Local-Roots/frontend/src/app/stores/[storeId]/page.tsx` (for metadata pattern)

Add the `listCities` function to api.ts:
```typescript
listCities: () =>
  requestJSON<{ city: string; region: string; slug: string; store_count: number }[]>("/v1/cities", {
    method: "GET",
    next: { revalidate: 300 },
  }),
```

Also add a `joinWaitlist` function:
```typescript
joinWaitlist: (email: string, lat?: number, lng?: number) =>
  requestJSON<{ id: string }>("/v1/waitlist", {
    method: "POST",
    body: JSON.stringify({ email, lat, lng }),
  }),
```

Do NOT create a layout.tsx ‚Äî just the page.tsx.

input.prompt:
Create the following SEO files for the Local Roots Next.js App Router frontend:

1. `/Users/brandonqueener/Cursor Projects/Local-Roots/frontend/src/app/sitemap.ts`
2. `/Users/brandonqueener/Cursor Projects/Local-Roots/frontend/src/app/robots.ts`

First READ these files to understand the project structure:
- `/Users/brandonqueener/Cursor Projects/Local-Roots/frontend/src/lib/api.ts` ‚Äî to understand how to call backend APIs
- `/Users/brandonqueener/Cursor Projects/Local-Roots/frontend/src/lib/http.ts` ‚Äî to understand requestJSON

**sitemap.ts:**
- Export a default async function that returns MetadataSitemap
- Fetch stores from `GET /v1/stores` and cities from `GET /v1/cities` (both are public endpoints)
- The backend base URL comes from `process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL || "http://localhost:8080"`
- The frontend base URL should be `process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL || "https://localroots.farm"`
- Include routes: `/`, `/stores`, each `/stores/{storeId}`, each `/farms/{citySlug}`
- Use Next.js App Router MetadataRoute.Sitemap type
- Make direct fetch calls to the backend (don't use the api module since this runs at build time and the api module may have client-side specifics)

**robots.ts:**
- Export a default function returning MetadataRoute.Robots
- Allow all crawlers
- Point to `/sitemap.xml`
- Disallow `/seller/`, `/auth/`, `/login`, `/register`

Use proper Next.js App Router conventions. These are TypeScript files, not XML.

Reference Next.js docs pattern:
```typescript
import type { MetadataRoute } from 'next'
export default function robots(): MetadataRoute.Robots { ... }
```

input.prompt:
Create a dynamic Open Graph image route for store pages at:
`/Users/brandonqueener/Cursor Projects/Local-Roots/frontend/src/app/stores/[storeId]/opengraph-image/route.tsx`

First READ:
- `/Users/brandonqueener/Cursor Projects/Local-Roots/frontend/src/app/stores/[storeId]/page.tsx` ‚Äî to understand the store detail page structure
- `/Users/brandonqueener/Cursor Projects/Local-Roots/frontend/src/lib/api.ts` ‚Äî to understand the api module
- `/Users/brandonqueener/Cursor Projects/Local-Roots/frontend/src/app/globals.css` ‚Äî for design tokens

This route should:
1. Use Next.js `ImageResponse` from `next/og`
2. Fetch store data from the backend API
3. Generate a 1200x630 OG image with:
   - Sand background (#f6f1e8)
   - Store name in large serif text (ink color #1c1b16)
   - "Local Roots" branding
   - If store has a city/region, show it below the name
   - A sage green accent bar or element (#2f6b4f)
   - Clean, readable layout
4. Set proper cache headers (revalidate: 3600)
5. Handle errors gracefully (return a generic fallback image)

Use this Next.js App Router pattern:
```typescript
import { ImageResponse } from 'next/og'
```

toolUseResult.prompt:
Create a city landing page at `/Users/brandonqueener/Cursor Projects/Local-Roots/frontend/src/app/farms/[city]/page.tsx`.

This is a Next.js App Router server component page for SEO-friendly city landing pages. The `city` param is a slug like `portland-or` or `austin-tx`.

Requirements:
1. Server component (use `await params`)
2. Fetch stores from the backend API using the `api` from `@/lib/api`
3. Also fetch city list from `GET /v1/cities` ‚Äî you'll need to add a `listCities` function to `@/lib/api` first (READ api.ts first to understand the pattern)
4. The cities endpoint returns `{ city, region, slug, store_count }[]`
5. Match the slug from params against the city list to get the proper city name
6. Generate metadata (title, description, og) using `generateMetadata`
7. Display stores using the existing `StoreCard` component from `@/components/store-card`
8. Add JSON-LD structured data for the city (LocalBusiness collection)
9. Use the project's design system: `lr-card`, `lr-card-strong`, `lr-animate`, `var(--lr-ink)`, `var(--lr-muted)`, `var(--lr-leaf)`, `var(--lr-bg)`
10. Include a link back to `/stores` (all farms)
11. Show empty state if no stores found: "No farms in {City} yet" with a friendly message
12. Heading pattern: "Local Farms in {City}, {Region}"

First READ these files to understand patterns:
- `/Users/brandonqueener/Cursor Projects/Local-Roots/frontend/src/lib/api.ts`
- `/Users/brandonqueener/Cursor Projects/Local-Roots/frontend/src/components/store-card.tsx`
- `/Users/brandonqueener/Cursor Projects/Local-Roots/frontend/src/app/stores/[storeId]/page.tsx` (for metadata pattern)

Add the `listCities` function to api.ts:
```typescript
listCities: () =>
  requestJSON<{ city: string; region: string; slug: string; store_count: number }[]>("/v1/cities", {
    method: "GET",
    next: { revalidate: 300 },
  }),
```

Also add a `joinWaitlist` function:
```typescript
joinWaitlist: (email: string, lat?: number, lng?: number) =>
  requestJSON<{ id: string }>("/v1/waitlist", {
    method: "POST",
    body: JSON.stringify({ email, lat, lng }),
  }),
```

Do NOT create a layout.tsx ‚Äî just the page.tsx.
